Currency Exchange Rate Calculator

Convert between major world currencies. Enter an amount and select currencies to see the converted value.

FAQ

How are exchange rates determined?

Exchange rates are determined by supply and demand in the foreign exchange market, influenced by interest rates, inflation, and economic stability.

What is the spread in currency exchange?

The spread is the difference between buy and sell rates. Banks and exchange services charge this as their fee.

Are these rates real-time?

These are approximate reference rates. For actual transactions, check with your bank or exchange service for current rates.
